events.title: AI in 2026: From Breakthrough Illusions to Operational Reality
events.content:
True agency requires more than tool calling. It requires judgment about when to act, when to stop, and when to ask for help. It requires robustness in the face of partial information. Most importantly, it requires systems that can recover from failure rather than collapse under it.

In 2025, we learned how far we are from that ideal. In 2026, the work will be about narrowing that gap. Progress will not come from declaring everything an agent, but from carefully expanding autonomy in domains wher
